title: Tree Axes By Juix
description: Datapack adding axes that chop down entire trees
body:
# ℹ️ Tree Axes By Juix The Tree Axes pack will simply add axes capable of cutting down entire trees in one fell swoop ! Consider them as axes with Vein mining.

![Intro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/181971f5ea5826733e261a0e67702be74cea29e1.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.3] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.3+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) You can craft tree axes this way :

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/132d25d747f5749f0f91429d9d499c52b66cbc55.png)
# 🆕 Features & Options - **_/function datapack:tree_axes_datapack/toggle_leaves_breaking_** | To ignore or include (included by default) the leaves of the tree that you have cut so that they disappear
- **_/function datapack:juix_datapacks/toggle_sneak_bypass_** | To enable or disable (disabled by default) Sneak bypass (tree axes stop working when sneaking)
# 🪳 Known issues - The leaves of a giant tree do not all disappear - This pack relies on item drop coordinates, please be careful with Magnet mods for example (Magnets by Juix is fully compatible with Hammers) Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
